en.name: Tangram
en.desc: The classic Chinese dissection puzzle! Arrange 7 geometric shapes to form various targets. A test of spatial reasoning and creativity!
en.howToPlay: Click and drag shapes to move them. Click a selected shape and use the Rotate button to rotate it. Arrange all shapes to match the target without overlapping.
tips: The square and parallelogram are tricky
Think about the target shape before placing
Classic puzzle from the Song Dynasty

zh.name: 七巧板
zh.desc: 经典的中国拆图谜题！排列7个几何形状组成各种目标。考验空间推理和创造力！
zh.howToPlay: 点击并拖动形状来移动它们。点击选中的形状并使用旋转按钮旋转它。排列所有形状以匹配目标，不要重叠。
tips: 正方形和平行四边形比较棘手
